name: Fort Worth City Credit Union - Felix St MicroBranch
description_short: Fort Worth City Credit Union is a Texas-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to members. The Felix St MicroBranch is a limited-service location of this full-service financial institution.
description_long:
Fort Worth City Credit Union (FWCCU) is an established credit union serving the Fort Worth, Texas area, currently in its 96th year of operation. As a member-owned cooperative financial institution, it operates under the credit union model where profits are returned to members through competitive rates and lower fees. The organization maintains multiple branch locations, including the Felix St MicroBranch, which serves as a point of access for their membership base.

FWCCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, high-yield savings accounts, youth accounts, club savings accounts, certificate of deposit (CD) accounts, individual retirement accounts (IRAs), and various loan products. Their lending services span vehicle loans (with promotional rates starting at 4.24% APR), home loans, home equity loans, personal loans, boat/RV/motorcycle loans, student loan refinancing, and credit cards including their Fort Worth Proud Visa. They also provide business checking accounts, balance transfer services, and interim construction financing.

The credit union differentiates itself through member-focused benefits including profit sharing, a refer-a-friend program, scholarship opportunities for high school seniors ($2,500), tax discounts, discount tickets, and employee benefits. They emphasize convenience with mobile banking access, online account opening, Zelle integration, foreign currency orders, direct deposit services, and ATM networks. The organization demonstrates community commitment through financial education resources, fraud prevention guidance, and multilingual services (Hablamos Español).

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, FWCCU operates on a non-profit, member-owned basis, which typically means more favorable rates and lower fees for members. However, membership eligibility requirements apply, and specific terms vary by location and product. The Felix St MicroBranch is positioned as a limited-service location, suggesting it may have restricted hours or service capabilities compared to full branches.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Member-owned credit union model with profit sharing for members
Competitive loan rates (auto loans starting at 4.24% APR, home equity at 5.96% APR)
High-yield savings accounts offering 2% APY more than standard rates
Comprehensive product suite including vehicle, personal, home, and student loans
Digital conveniences including mobile app, online banking, and Zelle integration
$2,500 college scholarship program for qualifying high school seniors
Additional member benefits including tax discounts and discount ticket programs
cons: Felix St MicroBranch is a limited-service location with likely restricted hours and services compared to full branches
Membership eligibility requirements apply; not everyone can automatically join
Credit card APR (10.9% on Fort Worth Proud Visa) is higher than some competitors
Limited information available about specific membership requirements and eligibility criteria
MicroBranch format suggests reduced in-person service availability and capability
best_for: Fort Worth area residents seeking competitive rates on auto loans and home equity financing
Individuals wanting to be part of a member-owned institution with profit sharing and community focus
Those eligible for membership looking for comprehensive banking services from one institution
High school seniors in Texas eligible for the credit union's college scholarship program
diagnosis: Fort Worth City Credit Union is best suited for Texas residents, particularly in the Fort Worth area, who are eligible for membership and seek competitive rates on loans and savings with the added benefit of member ownership and profit sharing. The Felix St MicroBranch is a limited-service location, so customers should verify what specific services are available at this branch location, as it may not offer all services available at full-service branches.
services: Home loans and home equity loans
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 505 W Felix St, Fort Worth, TX 76115
